name: epayco/woocommerce-integration-tests
description: Integration tests for ePayco WooCommerce gateway

scripts.test:handle-transaction:real: RUN_WC_REAL_INTEGRATION=1 WP_LOAD_PATH=../../wp-load.php WORDPRESS_DB_HOST=127.0.0.1:3308 WORDPRESS_DB_NAME=wordpress WORDPRESS_DB_USER=root WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=test phpunit -c phpunit.integration.xml --filter test_handle_transaction_with_shared_constants
scripts.test:successful-request: RUN_WC_REAL_INTEGRATION=1 WP_LOAD_PATH=../../wp-load.php WORDPRESS_DB_HOST=127.0.0.1:3308 WORDPRESS_DB_NAME=wordpress WORDPRESS_DB_USER=root WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=test phpunit -c phpunit.integration.xml --filter SuccessfulRequestIntegrationTest
